---
title: Maps
subtitle: Greater Boston city & town historic zoning maps and current zoning boundary overlays.
author: Nicholas Chiumenti
date: 3/11/2026
listing:
  id: map-listings
  contents: pages
  type: grid
  image-height: "100%"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 12  # limits number of items displayed per page
  grid-item-border: false
  grid-item-align: center
  fields: [title, image]
  #sort-ui: [title]
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
---

::: {#map-listings}
:::

{{< include _footer.qmd >}}
